category_sources: Official repository README describes modem tones, FSK protocols, radio, telephone, and audio communications media.
source_facts.description says it is a general-purpose software audio FSK modem.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best official documentation surface found and links back to source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: Official repository README copyright and homepage use the whence.com maintainer domain from source_facts.homepage.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from the official GitHub project linked to whence.com in its README.
